author: Lao Zi
text:
The highest good is like water.

Water is good at benefiting the myriad creatures
but also struggles to occupy the place
loathed by the masses.


Therefore,

it is near to the Way.

The guality of an abode is in its location.

The guality of the heart is in its depths.

The guality of giving lies in trust.

The guality of correct governance lies in orderly rule.
The guality of an enterprise depends on ability.

The guality of movement depends on timing.

Now,

it is precisely because one does not compete
that there is no blame.
